mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name as productName, product_model_number as productModelNumber, hot_stamping_type as hotStampingType, gold_paper_type as goldPaperType, compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, remarks, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, gold_paper_type

SELECT id, product_name as productName, product_model_number as productModelNumber, hot_stamping_type as hotStampingType, gold_paper_type as goldPaperType, compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, remarks, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, gold_paper_type LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, product_name as productName, product_model_number as productModelNumber, hot_stamping_type as hotStampingType, gold_paper_type as goldPaperType, compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, remarks, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping ( product_name, product_model_number, hot_stamping_type, gold_paper_type, compatibility_status, remarks, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{productModelNumber}, COALESCE(#{hotStampingType}, '燙金後擊凸'), #{goldPaperType}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{remarks}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping SET product_name = #{productName}, product_model_number = #{productModelNumber}, hot_stamping_type = COALESCE(#{hotStampingType}, '燙金後擊凸'), gold_paper_type = #{goldPaperType}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, remarks = #{remarks}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name as productName, product_model_number as productModelNumber, hot_stamping_type as hotStampingType, gold_paper_type as goldPaperType, compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, remarks, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping WHERE product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%') ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, gold_paper_type

SELECT id, product_name as productName, product_model_number as productModelNumber, hot_stamping_type as hotStampingType, gold_paper_type as goldPaperType, compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, remarks, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping WHERE product_model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productModelNumber}, '%') ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, gold_paper_type

SELECT id, product_name as productName, product_model_number as productModelNumber, hot_stamping_type as hotStampingType, gold_paper_type as goldPaperType, compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, remarks, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping WHERE gold_paper_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{goldPaperType}, '%') ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, gold_paper_type

SELECT id, product_name as productName, product_model_number as productModelNumber, hot_stamping_type as hotStampingType, gold_paper_type as goldPaperType, compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, remarks, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping WHERE product_name = #{productName} AND gold_paper_type = #{goldPaperType}
AND (product_model_number = #{productModelNumber} OR (product_model_number IS NULL AND #{productModelNumber} = ''))
AND (product_model_number IS NULL OR product_model_number = '')
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping SET compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, product_name as productName, product_model_number as productModelNumber, hot_stamping_type as hotStampingType, gold_paper_type as goldPaperType, compatibility_status as compatibilityStatus, remarks, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping
AND product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
AND product_model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productModelNumber}, '%')
AND gold_paper_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{goldPaperType}, '%')
ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number, gold_paper_type
SELECT DISTINCT gold_paper_type FROM wear_resistant_gold_paper_mapping WHERE gold_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND gold_paper_type != '' ORDER BY gold_paper_type
